headline: Has Occidental Petroleum (OXY) Run Too Far After Its 78% One Year Rally?
summary: Wondering if Occidental Petroleum at around US$62.94 is still offering value after a strong run, or if most of the upside is already reflected in the price. The stock has returned 16.1% over the last 30 days and 48.5% year to date, with a 78.1% return over the past year putting it firmly on many investors' radars despite a 3.2% slip in the last week. Recent coverage has focused on Occidental Petroleum's position in the US energy sector and ongoing investor interest in large oil and gas...
